2606.13680.title: Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
2606.13680.paper_summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a standard mechanism for grounding language models in external knowledge, yet conventional retrieval based on lexical or semantic similarity is poorly suited for complex reasoning tasks: a semantically similar problem may demand an entirely different solution strategy, while a superficially different problem may share the same underlying reasoning pattern. We propose Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RA-RFT), a post-training framework that teaches language models to reason by analogy. RA-RFT uses gold-relevance distillation to train a retriever that ranks contexts by expected reasoning benefit rather than semantic overlap, and then fine-tunes the policy model via reinforcement fine-tuning methods with retrieved analogous demonstrations, so the model learns to leverage reasoning traces under verifiable outcome rewards. We further analyze the diversity of retrieved contexts and find that reasoning-aware retrieval surfaces complementary solution strategies that provide distinct reasoning scaffolds for individual problems. Across challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks, RA-RFT consistently outperforms standard reinforcement fine-tuning methods. For example, it improves AIME 2025 average@32 accuracy by 7.1 and 2.8 points over GRPO for Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen3-4B respectively -- suggesting that reasoning-aware retrieval is a complementary axis of improvement and orthogonal to advances in reward design or training curricula.
2606.13680.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）已成為將語言模型與外部知識結合的標準機制，然而，基於詞彙或語義相似性的傳統檢索對於複雜推理任務並不適合：一個語義上相似的問題可能需要完全不同的解決策略，而一個表面上不同的問題可能共享相同的基本推理模式。我們提出了檢索增強強化微調（RA-RFT），這是一個後訓練框架，旨在教導語言模型通過類比進行推理。RA-RFT使用金標相關性蒸餾來訓練一個檢索器，該檢索器根據預期的推理收益而非語義重疊來對上下文進行排名，然後通過強化微調方法利用檢索到的類似示範來微調策略模型，使模型學會在可驗證的結果獎勵下利用推理痕跡。我們進一步分析了檢索到的上下文的多樣性，發現具有推理意識的檢索能夠呈現互補的解決策略，為個別問題提供不同的推理支架。在具有挑戰性的數學推理基準中，RA-RFT始終超越標準的強化微調方法。例如，它在AIME 2025 average@32的準確率上分別比GRPO提高了7.1和2.8個點，針對Qwen3-1.7B和Qwen3-4B -- 這表明具有推理意識的檢索是一個互補的改進軸，與獎勵設計或訓練課程的進展是正交的。
2606.13680.author: Zilin Xiao et.al.
2606.13680.authors: Zilin Xiao, Qi Ma, Chun-cheng Jason Chen, Xintao Chen, Avinash Atreya, Hanjie Chen, Vicente Ordonez
